title: The Children of the Forest: Ancient Guardians of Westeros

scenes.narration: Deep in the ancient forests of Westeros, before men ever set foot on the continent, lived a mysterious race...
scenes.image_prompt: Ancient forest with towering trees, mystical fog, and glowing symbols carved into bark, cinematic lighting, fantasy art style

scenes.narration: The Children of the Forest, small in stature but mighty in magic, were the first inhabitants of the land.
scenes.image_prompt: Small humanoid figures with large eyes and brown skin, wearing bark-like clothing, sitting around a glowing weirwood tree, mystical atmosphere

scenes.narration: They worshipped the old gods and carved faces into weirwood trees to watch over the forests they protected.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a carved weirwood face with red leaves, glowing eyes, mystical lighting, ancient texture

scenes.narration: Masters of nature magic, they could control beasts, plants, and even the weather itself.
scenes.image_prompt: Magical scene of a child of the forest commanding wolves and ravens, swirling magical energy, vibrant colors, fantasy style

scenes.narration: Their peaceful existence changed when the First Men arrived, cutting down their sacred weirwoods and sparking a war.
After centuries of conflict, a pact was made - the Children would keep the deep forests while men settled the open lands.
scenes.image_prompt: Ancient treaty scene with Children of the Forest and First Men shaking hands, weirwood trees in background, peaceful atmosphere

scenes.narration: But peace was short-lived. The Long Night brought the White Walkers, forcing the Children to create weapons of obsidian.
scenes.image_prompt: Children of the Forest crafting dragonglass weapons, blue glow of White Walkers in distance, dark and ominous atmosphere

scenes.narration: In a desperate act, they created the White Walkers themselves, unleashing a force they could no longer control.
scenes.image_prompt: Dramatic scene of a Child of the Forest plunging a dragonglass dagger into a human, blue energy swirling, dark fantasy style

scenes.narration: With the help of the First Men and the legendary hero Azor Ahai, they defeated the White Walkers in the Battle for the Dawn.
scenes.image_prompt: Epic battle scene with Children of the Forest, First Men, and Azor Ahai fighting White Walkers, dawn breaking on horizon

scenes.narration: As men built their kingdoms, the Children faded into legend, their magic and wisdom lost to time.
scenes.image_prompt: Abandoned weirwood grove with overgrown ruins, fading Children of the Forest figures, misty atmosphere, melancholic tone
